recent_projects.name: rydstate
recent_projects.summary: A Python package for calculating Rydberg wavefunctions.
recent_projects.author: RydState Developers

recent_projects.name: pyreindexer
recent_projects.summary: A connector that allows to interact with Reindexer. Reindexer static library or reindexer-dev package must be installed
recent_projects.author: Igor Tulmentyev

recent_projects.name: bizyui
recent_projects.summary: Web resources for [a/BizyAir](https://github.com/siliconflow/BizyAir) which contains Comfy Nodes that can run in any environment.

recent_projects.name: mblt-model-zoo
recent_projects.summary: A collection of pre-quantized AI models for Mobilint NPUs.

recent_projects.name: iflow-mcp_mcp-server-medRxiv
recent_projects.summary: An MCP server for searching and retrieving articles from medRxiv

recent_projects.name: mooring-data-generator
recent_projects.summary: Random-data generator to simulate fictional port data flows for use at a Hackathon
recent_projects.author: Ben Fitzhardinge

recent_projects.name: refscan
recent_projects.summary: Command-line program that scans the NMDC MongoDB database for referential integrity violations
